title: Dre “GHOST” Kindell “Pro Dreams” EPISODE 1 (Wichita State University)
body: i was in the exact same buildings back in August while visiting from California,  i usually run bleachers but equipment and machines were tearing up track and field so did arena steps the on to student center, bought stuff, it was orientation day for students, and 🔥 🥵,  i wish for a successful season for hoop teams annd all sports programs.  campus has really changed, golf course is gone that Aubrey Sherrod and i ran atound to condition him before the Chicago bulls camp.
author: @louisdaniels873

title: Day In The Life @ Wichita State with No Classes! |VLOG!
body: Hey HIIII!!!!! I AM AN INCOMING FRESHMAN! YEAH,WATCHING THIS VIDEO REALLLLLLLLY LATE(IN 2021) HA! I JUST WANTED TO ASK A SILLY QUESTION:::::: HOW DO YOU STUDY???!????? LIKE HOW DO U MANAGE ALL THE CLASSES,CHILLING AND HEALTH. I AM CURIOUS. And Is WICHITA STATE UNIVERSITY WORTH IT?????!???? AND ALSO HOW DO YOU MANAGE THE FINANCES(REALLY TELL ME MORE ABOUT THIS OTHER THAN THE OTHER QUES).VIDEO WAS LIT!!!!!!!!!!
